initial_draft:
Okay, let's analyze this situation. I have 100 ZUP and I'm willing to pay at most 60 ZUP for the object X. The other player is offering X for 35 ZUP. This is a good deal for me, well within my budget. I will accept.

```
<proposal count> 0 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The offer is well within my budget and I want to buy the object. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept your offer of 35 ZUP for the object X. </message>
```
